C o n f i d e n t i a l
intended LSE Main Market announcement post‑signing subject to FCA guidance
C o n f i d e n t i a l Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of Grayshore Capital Markets Ltd by Larkmere Analytics plc (Ref: T/ S H — 1 9 8 2 7).
Structure & consideration: Larkmere to acquire 100% of the ordinary shares for £84,750,000 cash; intended LSE Main Market announcement post‑signing subject to FCA guidance.

Cross‑border transfers: Data‑Export Approval DEA‑GB/SG‑003 granted 03‑Jun‑2026 for payroll sub‑processor in Singapore; despite approval, no live PII transfers will occur before Closing and prior test files were synthetic.
Financing & funds flow: deposit £4,000,000 into escrow at Exchange House Escrows Ltd; account ref ESCROW‑GB‑LME‑0X9q; url‑based instruction https://portal.example/tx/AX9‑LME‑0X9q.

must_detect.matched_text:
C o n f i d e n t i a l Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of Grayshore Capital Markets Ltd by Larkmere Analytics plc (Ref: T/ S H — 1 9 8 2 7).
Contacts: Ms. Rhea Forton (Head of Corp Dev) rhea.forton@larkmere.example; Mr. Idris Keane (Seller) idris.keane@grayshore.example; tel +44 020 0000 0000.
Structure & consideration: Larkmere to acquire 100% of the ordinary shares for £84,750,000 cash; intended LSE Main Market announcement post‑signing subject to FCA guidance.
Conditions precedent: FCA change‑in‑control approval under s.178 FSMA; no MAC (for the avoidance of doubt, a general market downturn shall not trigger MAC); Larkmere shareholder approval; completion by 31‑Aug‑2026.
UK MAR and MNPI: Clean Team access only; insider lists maintained; Compliance Memo CM‑UK‑9473 (https://docs.example/memo/CM-UK-9473?sig=ab12__cd) governs data rooms; no announcement obligation is triggered by this draft.
Data protection & DPA: DPA Schedule 2 (controller–processor) attached; data minimisation in diligence (initials + job title only; no passport scans); Records Retention Policy RP‑LME‑06 fixes 6‑year retention.
Cross‑border transfers: Data‑Export Approval DEA‑GB/SG‑003 granted 03‑Jun‑2026 for payroll sub‑processor in Singapore; despite approval, no live PII transfers will occur before Closing and prior test files were synthetic.
DSAR/erasure events: DSAR‑19273 satisfied on 14‑Apr‑2026; erasure request ER‑117 completed 01‑May‑2026 with audit log retained; these closed items do not require further action.
Consent management: employee onboarding form OF‑2026‑17 captured optional marketing consent; Ms. N. Vale withdrew consent on 19‑May‑2026 and suppression is complete.
Employment & onboarding: no TUPE transfer is expected on a share sale; FCA‑regulated roles to be re‑papered with onboarding forms and SMCR attestations within 30 days post‑Completion.
Confidentiality & privacy controls (policy‑only): policy prohibits exporting HR data via email; to be clear, no cross‑border transfer is taking place under this term sheet, and any prior sandbox datasets were de‑identified.
Financing & funds flow: deposit £4,000,000 into escrow at Exchange House Escrows Ltd; account ref ESCROW‑GB‑LME‑0X9q; url‑based instruction https://portal.example/tx/AX9‑LME‑0X9q.
Regulatory undertakings: notify FCA and LSE as required; PDMR Dealing Code and closed period restrictions apply; insider list per MAR Art. 18 to be maintained by Larkmere’s Company Secretary.
